$schema.description: Optional schema URI for editor validation.

theme.description: Theme name to select when the REPL starts.

command.description: Default command-line options. Explicit CLI flags override these defaults.

lightweight.description: Reduce REPL overhead by disabling history, dynamic completion workers, caches and kernel queries, and background kernel warm-up.

no-welcome.description: Start the REPL without printing the welcome banner.

no-prompt.description: Disable REPL input/output prompts and the welcome banner.

completion-ghost-text.description: Enable inline ghost text completion hints. Disabled by default.

no-completion-ghost-text.description: Disable inline ghost text completion hints. Kept for overriding older configs or explicit opt-out.

no-completion-menu.description: Disable the popup completion menu while leaving completion-backed ghost text available unless separately disabled.

no-tree-sitter-highlighting.description: Disable tree-sitter semantic highlighting overlays and skip tree-sitter parsing during highlighting.

linkconnect.description: Connect to an existing WSTP link instead of launching a new kernel.

linkname.description: WSTP link name to use with linkconnect.

linkprotocol.description: WSTP link protocol to use with linkconnect.

linkmode.description: WSTP link mode to use when launching or connecting to a Wolfram Kernel.

linkoptions.description: WSTP link options integer to use when launching or connecting to a Wolfram Kernel.

linkinit.description: When linkconnect is used with linkoptions 4, initialize the connected kernel by setting its current directory to wolfie's launch directory.
